scenes.text: My dad put glow-in-the-dark stars on my ceiling when I was six.
scenes.image_prompt: Glow-in-the-dark plastic stars on a bedroom ceiling, faint green glow in a dark room, child's bedroom, warm nostalgic mood, cinematic, shallow depth of field looking upward, 4k

scenes.text: He stood on the bed with a chair cushion under his feet because we didn't own a ladder. He let me pick where each one went.
scenes.image_prompt: A father standing on a child's bed reaching up to press a glow star onto the ceiling, small child pointing upward excitedly, warm bedroom lamp light, late 1990s decor, cinematic, emotional, nostalgic, 4k

scenes.text: Some of them fell off over the years. First the big ones, then the little ones, like real stars burning out.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a bedroom ceiling with scattered glow-in-the-dark stars, some missing leaving faint marks, dust and age visible, soft ambient light, passage of time feeling, cinematic, melancholic, 4k

scenes.text: I'm twenty-five now. I moved back home for a while. And they're still there. Barely glowing.
scenes.image_prompt: A young adult lying in a childhood bed staring up at a ceiling, faint green glow from remaining stars above, dark room, moonlight through curtains, emotional, intimate cinematic portrait, shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: And every night, for a few minutes, I'm six again. And my dad is standing on the bed, reaching for the ceiling, making me a sky.
scenes.image_prompt: Dreamlike double exposure of a father reaching toward a ceiling full of glowing stars blending into a real starry night sky, warm golden and green tones, deeply emotional, cinematic, nostalgic, ethereal, 4k
